summary.oaf_policy: MP11 narrative OAF defaults: OAF1=15% and OAF2=5%, emitted as BTC factors 0.85 and 0.95.
summary.regen_delay_policy: Future managed candidate rows use one-year regeneration delay from MP11 Section 8.2.7.1.
summary.join_boundary: Table 57 rows can produce standalone future-managed curve-generation candidates. Tables 54/55 remain blocked pending a public MP11 existing/recent AU-code to BEC/site-series mapping before BatchTIPSY handoff.
summary.use_boundary: Rows are handoff candidates only and remain not_model_input.
